name: veduta_city_v1_p1
description: Pass 1: Convert historical city views (Veduten) to modern photorealistic cityscapes
intended_image_type: Historical city views, architectural panoramas, Vedute engravings
pass_purpose: Translate historical engraving to modern cityscape while preserving landmarks and layout

prompt_templates.positive: photorealistic modern city view of {city}, high quality, detailed architecture, natural lighting, 8k
prompt_templates.negative: drawing, painting, sketch, illustration, engraving, low quality, blurry, distorted, text, watermark

denoise.note: Higher denoise acceptable for city views

expected_failure_modes: Landmarks may change character if denoise too high
Historical buildings may become too modern
notes: Original vedute preset. Higher denoise acceptable for city views where exact building details less critical than overall layout.
